calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ANIS SHAMIYEH FOR PLAINTIFF ADIB KHOURI
DEFENDANT DAWN SPEROPOULOS IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 1751 MARKET STREET #51 WITH A STAY OF EXECUTION TO 5/14/05. IF DEFENDANT VACATES AND TURNS IN KEYS TIMELY, PLAINTIFF WILL PAY DEFENDANT $2000. DEFENDANT TO LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. EACH PARTY WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER. DEFENDANT TO ALLOW ACCESS WITHIN SEVEN DAYS FOR PLAINTIFF TO DO REPAIRS. TERMS TO REMAIN CONFIDENTIAL. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 5/14/05 PLAINTIFF MAY ENFORCE JUDGMENT AND WAIVE $2000 PAYMENT TO DEFENDANT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:PETER HADIARIS; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER (218)
